mapper.select: select m.material_id, m.ent_code, m.material_code, m.material_name, m.brand, m.model_spec, m.category_code, m.category_name, m.unit, m.unit_price, m.min_stock, ifnull(s.current_qty, 0) as current_qty, m.status, m.remark, m.create_time, m.update_time from t_material_info m left join ( select material_id, sum(ifnull(current_qty, 0)) as current_qty from t_material_stock group by material_id ) s on s.material_id = m.material_id where m.material_id = #{materialId}
mapper.insert: insert into t_material_info (material_id, ent_code, material_code, material_name, brand, model_spec, category_code, category_name, unit, unit_price, min_stock, status, remark) values (#{materialId}, #{entCode}, #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{brand}, #{modelSpec}, #{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{unit}, #{unitPrice}, #{minStock}, #{status}, #{remark})

insert into t_material_info (material_id, ent_code, material_code, material_name, brand, model_spec, category_code, category_name, unit, unit_price, min_stock, status, remark) values
(#{item.materialId}, #{item.entCode}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.brand}, #{item.modelSpec}, #{item.categoryCode}, #{item.categoryName}, #{item.unit}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.minStock}, #{item.status}, #{item.remark})
mapper.select: select coalesce((select count(*) from t_material_stock where material_id = #{materialId}), 0) + coalesce((select count(*) from t_material_in_order_item where material_id = #{materialId}), 0) + coalesce((select count(*) from t_material_apply_order_item where material_id = #{materialId}), 0) + coalesce((select count(*) from t_material_out_order_item where material_id = #{materialId}), 0) + coalesce((select count(*) from t_material_return_order_item where material_id = #{materialId}), 0)
